shots.research_notes: Efforts to fetch the Vori homepage and related content returned multiple instances of blocked queries and missing results. This indicates potential accessibility issues with Vori's online presence at the moment.
shots.failure_reason: No public web presence found for Vori; unable to retrieve homepage or related assets.

shots.research_notes: After multiple search attempts for the Vori product introduction video, I found relevant media on the Vori official page and a press release announcing their AI-powered POS system, VoriOS. Two video captures were successfully recorded showcasing the functionality and benefits of Vori's technology.

Vori Unveils VoriOS: The Revolutionary AI-Powered Point-of-Sale System and Back Office Suite for Independent Grocers, Connecting Data Across the Food Supply Chain
NEWS PROVIDED BY
Vori

Jul 01, 2024, 14:50 ET

SHARE THIS ARTICLE
    
The new grocery store POS system



From silo to shelf to spoon, VoriOS is a celebrated alternative to the legacy and ill-fitting POS systems serving the independent grocery industry today

SAN FRANCISCO, July 1, 2024 /PRNewswire-PRWeb/ -- Vori, maker of the modern grocery operating system, today announced the launch of VoriOS, a cloud-based point-of-sale system and supplier-integrated back office suite, enhanced with automated pricing management features and turn-key shopper engagement tools. VoriOS places the power of AI, machine learning, and world-class engineering into the capable hands of ambitious independent grocery store owners and their staff.

After an 18-month closed beta period with customer","images":[{"url":"https://i.ytimg.com/vi/zLwFyrrhTCM/hqdefault.jpg","alt":null,"width":64,"height":64},{"url":"https://mma.prnewswire.com/media/2452116/Vori_01_1x1_V31.jpg","alt":"The new grocery store POS system","width":400,"height":400},{"url":"https://mma.prnewswire.com/media/2452117/VoriLogo.jpg?w=350","alt":"Vori","width":267,"height":100}],"videos":[{"url":"https://prnewswireassociationllc.demdex.net/dest5.html?d_nsid=0#https%3A%2F%2Fwww.prweb.com","kind":"iframe"},{"url":"https://fls.doubleclick.net/activityi;src=3773657;type=prweb585;cat=prweb363;ord=2607499620977.568?","kind":"iframe"}],"consent_dismissed":true,"content_match_score":0.5,"matches_expected":true}
